scripts.validate:env: npm run validate:env -w shared-contracts && npm run validate:env -w ai-hq-backend && npm run validate:env -w meta-bot-backend && npm run validate:env -w twilio-voice-backend && npm run validate:env -w ai-hq-frontend
scripts.lint:all: npm run lint -w shared-contracts && npm run lint -w ai-hq-backend && npm run lint -w meta-bot-backend && npm run lint -w twilio-voice-backend && npm run lint -w ai-hq-frontend
scripts.test:all: npm run test -w shared-contracts && npm run test -w ai-hq-backend && npm run test -w meta-bot-backend && npm run test -w twilio-voice-backend && npm run test -w ai-hq-frontend
scripts.build:all: npm run build -w shared-contracts && npm run build -w ai-hq-backend && npm run build -w meta-bot-backend && npm run build -w twilio-voice-backend && npm run build -w ai-hq-frontend
